command: root=$(git -C "$(dirname "$1")" rev-parse --show-toplevel); cd "$root"; dotnet format ViajantesTurismo.slnx --include "$1" --no-restore
root=$(git -C "$(dirname "$1")" rev-parse --show-toplevel); rel=${1#"$root"/}; cd "$root"; bash scripts/lint-markdown.sh --fix "$rel"

root=$(git -C "$(dirname "$1")" rev-parse --show-toplevel); rel=${1#"$root"/}; cd "$root"; if command -v shfmt >/dev/null 2>&1; then shfmt -w -i 4 -ci -bn -sr -- "$1"; else docker run --rm --user "$(id -u):$(id -g)" --env HOME=/tmp --volume "$root:/workspace" --workdir /workspace mvdan/shfmt:v3.11.0 -w -i 4 -ci -bn -sr -- "$rel"; fi
